arts.ttl: Bayern boss Vincent Kompany hopeful Harry Kane will be fit for Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: The England striker limped off against Bayer Leverkusen after taking a knock to his left ankle.

arts.ttl: England suffer Harry Kane injury scare as Vincent Kompany provides update
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and England suffer an untimely scare over the fitness of Harry Kane, who is forced off injured against Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Aleksandar Pavlovic stunner earns Bayern Munich draw against Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Inter Milan got back to winning ways in Italy, but Barcelona suffered a shock 4-2 loss against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Aleksandar Pavlović talks after his stunning equalizer against Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Undoubtedly, the highlight of Bayern Munich ’s long-awaited clash with Leverkusen was Aleksandar Pavlović’s rocket of an equalizer from over thirty yards out, and the passionate celebration right after. Speaking about the game, Pavlović too expressed a touch of remorse for not getting as much from the game as the team wanted: “We had so many chances and didn’t reward ourselves.

arts.ttl: Dominic Solanke details private Harry Kane conversation in Tottenham dressing room
arts.sum: MANCHESTER UNITED vs TOTTENHAM: Dominic Solanke is looking to make it three goals in as many matches at Old Trafford despite claiming he will never be able to replace goal-scoring icon Harry Kane at Spurs

arts.ttl: Harry Kane injured in Bayern Munich's draw with Bayer Leverkusen ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Harry Kane will be hungry to win honours in his second season at Bayern Munich but has suffered a setback four games into the season after limping out of their title clash against Bayer Leverkusen with a foot injury

arts.ttl: Bayern fretting over Kane's ankle after England star injured against Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Harry Kane went off with an apparent left ankle injury in the 1-1 draw with Bayer Leverkusen in the Bundesliga on Saturday. Kane was to have a check on the ankle on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Match Awards from Bayern Munich’s 1-1 draw with Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Following on from Bayern Munich ’s draw against Bayer Leverkusen, it is time to pick out the best opposition player as well as the best defender, midfielder, attacker and the MOTM of the game. Bayer Leverkusen’s players were clearly instructed to put more pressure on Kimmich than his other midfield partners and it paid off early with the ball given away cheaply once.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show: Bayern Munich 1-1 Bayer Leverkusen (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen faced in a match that was months in the making. Bayern Munich did a lot of effective things — find out where we thought the Bavarians excelled.

arts.ttl: Five observations from Bayern Munich’s disappointing 1-1 draw to Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: In a way, it’s understandable — Bayern Munich were thoroughly dominating Leverkusen even before the subs, so they couldn’t have made much more of a difference. Twenty goals scored, Harry Kane, Jamal Musiala, Michael Olise all looking like world beaters.
